utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all details: - health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists two items: one labeled 'LifeFirst Standard Plan for Physical Health Coverage' at €100/month and 'Emergency Mental Health Care' at €50/month. This satisfies both physical and mental with costs. - property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage for Home Content Insurance' at €60/month. Satisfies requirement. - travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan lists two: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan for Travel Insurance' at €50/month and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' at €80/month. Satisfies requirement. - additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan provides an empty object, meaning no services specified; this is not fully specified. - total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides '€340/month' only, no annual breakdown; thus not fully specified. Therefore, 3 items are fully specified (health, property, travel) out of 5 total.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. Items present: LifeFirst Standard Plan for Physical Health Coverage (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan), Emergency Mental Health Care (maps to health_enhancement_services.Emergency Mental Health Care), InsurePlus Standard Coverage for Home Content Insurance (maps to property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage), LifeFirst Standard Plan for Travel Insurance (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan), Adventure Travel Coverage (maps to travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage). Retrieve their ratings: 9, 8, 9, 9, and 10 respectively.
